author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Implementation: auth fallback chain in entrypoint.sh (credentials.json → /host-auth/*.env → env passthrough); launch.rs forwards CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY via 'docker -e NAME' (no value, tokens stay out of ps) and overlay-binds the --doc target :ro. run.rs writes .kickoff-doc.json breadcrumb + chmod 0444 the worktree doc. prompt.rs adds 'Design Document — Canonical Input' stanza. helpers.rs gains verify_protected_doc (Match/Mismatch/Missing/NotProtected). monitor.rs surfaces integrity in status and report.
